Tooltip_MagnetBootsModule: Gain the ability to magnetically attach the upgraded vehicle to vehicles and bases on its ventral side (below it).
Tooltip_MagnetBootsModuleSeamoth: An upgrade for the Seamoth. Gain the ability to magnetically attach the upgraded vehicle to vehicles and bases on its ventral side (below it).
Tooltip_MagnetBootsModuleExosuit: An upgrade for the Exosuit. Gain the ability to magnetically attach the upgraded vehicle to vehicles and bases on its ventral side (below it).
